about.label: About Us
about.title: About S&B Astro
about.storyP1: S&B Astro — Dharma Sastha Jothida Nilayam — was founded by Santosh Kumar with over 10 years of dedicated research into Vedic astrology and its application to sports outcomes. What started as a personal passion for planetary science has grown into India's most trusted sports astrology platform.
about.storyP2: Using the ancient KP (Krishnamurti Paddhati) system combined with modern analysis, we've achieved a consistent 90% accuracy rate in cricket match predictions, verified by our transparent track record that anyone can audit.
about.missionDesc: To make Vedic sports astrology accessible, transparent, and trustworthy — bringing ancient Indian wisdom to the modern world of sports. We believe that the celestial science developed by our ancestors holds remarkable analytical power, and we aim to present it in a modern, verifiable format.
about.value1Desc: We apply rigorous methodology to every prediction, combining centuries-old Vedic calculations with modern computational tools.
about.value2Desc: Our full track record is open for anyone to verify. We never hide our wrong predictions — accountability builds trust.
about.value3Desc: We strictly oppose gambling and betting. Our predictions are for entertainment and educational purposes only.

method.label: Our Method
method.title: KP Astrology Method
method.intro: Understanding how Vedic planetary science analyzes match outcomes with remarkable accuracy.
method.step1Desc: For every match, we cast a horoscope chart at the exact scheduled start time. This 'Prashna Kundli' (query chart) captures the planetary positions at the moment the match begins.
method.step2Desc: Using the KP system, we analyze the sub-lords, significators, and ruling planets relevant to sports outcomes — specifically the 1st house (home team), 6th house (victory), and 11th house (gains).
method.step3Desc: Both teams are mapped to specific houses and their planetary strengths are compared. We analyze Dasha periods, transit impacts, and sublordic promises for each team.
method.step4Desc: The final result combines chart analysis with planetary patterns and historical accuracy data to determine the most likely winner with a confidence percentage.
method.kpDesc: KP (Krishnamurti Paddhati) is a scientifically structured branch of Vedic astrology developed by Prof. K.S. Krishnamurti. It is known for its precision and is widely used for event prediction.
method.kpPoint1: Uses a sub-lord system for pinpoint accuracy — far more precise than traditional Parashari methods.
method.kpPoint2: Relies on the Placidus house system allowing exact cusp and sub-lord calculations.
method.kpPoint3: Refined over decades for event-based predictions — ideal for timed events like cricket matches.
method.disclaimer: Predictions are for entertainment and educational purposes only. Not betting advice. 18+ only.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy — S&B Astro
privacy.content:
S&B Astro — Dharma Sastha Jothida Nilayam respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data. This privacy policy informs you about how we handle your data when you visit our website (SBASTRO.COM) or use our mobile application, providing a secure and transparent experience in compliance with India's Digital Personal Data Protection Act (DPDP) and international standards.

1. Data We Collect: We collect minimal data necessary for service provision, including mobile numbers for OTP authentication and basic profile info.
2. Use of Data: Your data is used strictly for authentication, personalized astrology analysis, and notification of match outcomes.
3. Data Security: We implement rigorous security measures to protect your data from unauthorized access.
4. No Third-Party Sharing: We do not sell or share your personal data with third parties for marketing purposes.
5. Your Rights: You have the right to access, correct, or request deletion of your personal data at any time via our support channels.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions — S&B Astro
terms.intro: By using SBASTRO.COM or S&B Astro mobile application, you agree to the following terms.

sections.title: 1. Educational & Informational Service
sections.content: S&B Astro provides sports astrology analysis based on traditional Vedic astrology research. The service is provided only for educational and informational purposes to help users understand astrology-based analysis. The service does not provide betting advice or financial advice.

sections.title: 2. No Gambling Service
sections.content: S&B Astro does not offer gambling services, does not promote betting activities, does not operate as a betting platform, and does not facilitate wagering or gaming. Users must follow local laws regarding their actions.

sections.title: 3. No Guaranteed Results
sections.content: Astrology predictions are based on research and interpretation. Actual outcomes may vary. We do not guarantee match results or financial gain.

sections.title: 4. User Responsibility
sections.content: Users are fully responsible for how they interpret and use the information provided.

sections.title: 5. Age Requirement
sections.content: Users must be 18 years or older.

sections.title: 6. Payments
sections.content: Predictions are digital informational products. All purchases are final. No refund after delivery.

sections.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
sections.content: S&B Astro is not responsible for any loss, damage, or consequences arising from the use of information provided.

refund.title: Refund Policy — S&B Astro
refund.content:
At S&B Astro, we provide digital informational products (Vedic astrology predictions). Due to the nature of digital content delivery, we follow a strict no-refund policy.

1. Final Sale: All purchases made on SBASTRO.COM or the mobile app are final.
2. No Refunds: Once a prediction is unlocked or delivered, no refunds will be issued under any circumstances.
3. Technical Issues: If you experience a technical failure preventing access to a purchased product, contact our support team for assistance in restoring access.

sections.title: 1. Educational Purpose Only
sections.content: All predictions and analysis provided by S&B Astro are for educational purposes, informational purposes, and astrology research learning. The service is not intended to influence betting or financial decisions.

sections.title: 2. Research-Based Interpretation
sections.content: Predictions are based on traditional Vedic astrology calculations and proprietary research methods. They represent astrological interpretation only.

sections.title: 3. No Guarantee of Accuracy
sections.content: While research-based methods are used, outcomes cannot be guaranteed.

sections.title: 4. Not Financial or Betting Advice
sections.content: The platform does not provide financial advice, investment advice, or betting recommendations.

sections.title: 5. User Discretion
sections.content: Users must use their own judgment while interpreting any information.

sections.title: 1. No Financial Promise
sections.content: S&B Astro does not promise or guarantee financial gain, profit, or success.

sections.title: 2. Informational Product
sections.content: The service provides astrology-based informational content only.

sections.title: 3. Risk Acknowledgment
sections.content: Any decision taken by the user based on the information is at the user's own risk.
